metadata.title: JavaScript Engine Simulator
metadata.description: Step-by-step JavaScript engine visualizer: Tokenizer → Parser → Interpreter

emptyStates.tokenList: No tokens yet. Write code and parse it.
emptyStates.astTree: No AST yet. Parse your code first.

about.heading: About
about.description: JavaScript Engine Simulator is an educational tool that visualizes how JS code flows through the Tokenizer → Parser → Interpreter pipeline, step by step.

simulatorNotice.heading: Simulator Notice
simulatorNotice.virtualSimulatorText: This is a <highlight>virtual simulator</highlight>, not a real JS runtime.
simulatorNotice.setTimeoutTick: setTimeout runs on a tick-based schedule, not real time.

about.heading: About
about.description: This simulator visualizes how DOM events propagate through the Capturing → Target → Bubbling phases, step by step.

phases.heading: Event Phases
phases.capturingDesc: Event travels from window down to the target's parent.
phases.targetDesc: Event reaches the target element. All listeners fire regardless of useCapture.
phases.bubblingDesc: Event bubbles from target's parent back up to window.

concepts.heading: Key Concepts
concepts.stopPropagation: stopPropagation() — Prevents the event from reaching the next node.
concepts.stopImmediate: stopImmediatePropagation() — Also prevents remaining listeners on the same node.
concepts.preventDefault: preventDefault() — Cancels the browser's default behavior (e.g., form submission).
concepts.delegation: Event Delegation — Attaching a single listener to a parent to handle child events.
